name: digimetrics-saas-backend
description: Auth, metering gateway, credits ledger and Stripe billing for the Digimetrics SaaS.

scripts.package: node scripts/build.mjs && aws cloudformation package --template-file template.yaml --s3-bucket aws-sam-cli-managed-default-samclisourcebucket-fhg7g9oh6l2a --output-template-file /tmp/pkg.yaml --region ap-southeast-1
scripts.deploy: echo 'No SAM CLI here. Deploy is a reviewed CloudFormation change-set: npm run package, then create-change-set (secrets as UsePreviousValue=true), describe-change-set, execute-change-set. Full commands in ../DEPLOY.md step 3.' && exit 1
